positive: Minimalist abstract scene featuring stylized, interlocking mountain peaks and deep forest foliage. The composition should be centrally focused, creating a strong, bold silhouette design. Use a palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and charcoal gray, contrasted against a clean off-white background. The art style is modern geometric illustration with a stylized, negative space approach. High contrast, vector-quality clean lines, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Aspect ratio square. Trending on Artstation, digital art, clean lines, symmetrical balance.
negative: photorealistic, excessive detail, noise, blur, ugly, watermark, text, signature, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low contrast, gradient sky
